problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
